commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Then your handmaid said, The word of my lord the king shall now be comfortable: for as an angel of God, so is my lord the king to discern good and bad: therefore the LORD your God will be with you. Sacrifice; perfect and inviolable. (Tirinus) Cursing, provided he be in the right. (Menochius) Hebrew, "the king to discern (hear) good and bad "of consummate wisdom; (ver. ; Haydock) so that no one can impose upon him.
